title: Breedable Indicator
description: Mobs that are willing to be bred will give off heart particles when you hold their favorite food.
body: Mobs that are willing to breed will have hearts appear above them if you hold one of their valid breeding items. This is to help tell them apart from mobs who have bred already. This pack reads from the vanilla item tags that determine what items mobs breed with, so if another data pack modifies these tags, this data pack will still work.
